title: wrightia poomae
intro: Wrightia poomae, also known as Thai jasmine or Wrightia, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions in Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Wrightia poomae include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, Wrightia poomae is often used as a tea or tincture, or added to baths for its relaxing and soothing properties.
